title: Add spec.resources field to Keystone CRD
summary: Review of changes addressing external reviewer (berendt) feedback: (1) added TODO(CC-0042) comment to reconcile_database.go db-sync container for symmetry with 3 sibling Job files, (2) added status assertion (updatedReplicas/availableReplicas) to E2E Step 4, (3) added catch block to E2E Step 4 for failure diagnostics, (4) added export rationale comment to default resource vars, (5) added TestValidateUpdate_ResourcesRequestExceedsLimit unit test. All changes are correct, minimal, and focused.

tests_checklist.item: All existing unit tests pass (go test ./operators/keystone/...)
go vet passes on changed packages
New test follows existing patterns (NewGomegaWithT, KeystoneWebhook struct, validKeystone helper)
E2E Step 4 now asserts both spec and status (rollout completion)

code_quality_checklist.item: TODO(CC-0042) comment matches identical pattern in 3 sibling Job files
Export rationale comment is concise and informative
No unnecessary changes beyond external review scope

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
No scope creep beyond external review feedback

suggested_improvements: The E2E Step 4 catch block uses native Chainsaw constructs (podLogs, command, events) while Step 2 uses a shell script approach. Both are valid — the native approach is more concise. Consider standardizing on one pattern across all E2E tests in a future cleanup ticket.
next_steps: Merge after CI passes — all external review feedback has been addressed correctly
